def redact(text: str, label: str = "<REDACTED>") -> str:
    text = re.sub(r"(?i)(token|secret)=([A-Za-z0-9_-]{6,})", lambda m: m.group(1)+"="+label, text)
    return re.sub(r"[A-Za-z0-9._%+-]+@[A-Za-z0-9.-]+\.[A-Za-z]{2,}", "<EMAIL>", text)

def parse_config(text: str) -> Dict[str, any]:
    data = json.loads(text) if text.strip() else {}
    out = {"debug": False, "retries": 3, "timeout": 30}
    out.update(data)
    return out

# Example usage:
items = []
item = add_item(items, "Hello, world!")
print(item)

list_items(items)

text = '{"token":"1234567890", "secret":"password"}'
redacted_text = redact(text)
print(redacted_text)

config_text = '{"debug": true, "retries": 5}'
parsed_config = parse_config(config_text)
print(parsed_config)

def filter_items_by_tag(items: List[Dict[str, any]], tag: str) -> List[Dict[str, any]]:
    return [item for item in items if item.get("tag") == tag]

# Example usage:

filtered_items = filter_items_by_tag(items, "important")
print(filtered_items)

def parse_config(text):
    data = json.loads(text) if text.strip() else {}
    out = {"debug": False, "retries": 3, "timeout": 30}
    out.update(data)
    return out

# New function to add a configurable replacement label
def add_item_with_label(items, text, label="<REDACTED>"):
    item = {"id": len(items) + 1, "text": redact(text, label), "done": False}
    items.append(item)
    return item
